items.title: Toward Parking Spot Occupancy Recognition: A Self-Supervised Approach
items.abstract: As urban areas expand, automatic monitoring of parking lots becomes essential for efficient and sustainable cities. This work proposes a self-supervised approach for parking spot occupancy recognition

items.title: Google Cloud generative AI automates council planning operations
